title: Aerial Panorama of Place de l'Étoile, Paris
description: An early 20th-century aerial photograph of the Place de l'Étoile (now Place Charles de Gaulle) in Paris, featuring the Arc de Triomphe at its center. The photo was taken from a balloon at an altitude of 700 meters.

title: Foișorul de Foc, Bucharest, Romania
description: A vintage postcard depicting the Foișorul de Foc (The Fire Tower) in Bucharest. The card was postally used in 1903 and published by Ad. Maier & D. Stern.

title: Ateneul Român (Romanian Athenaeum), Bucharest
description: A vintage postcard featuring the Romanian Athenaeum, a famous concert hall in Bucharest, surrounded by its park. The image captures the grandeur of the building and its green surroundings.

title: Palatul Printului Sturza, Bucharest
description: A vintage postcard featuring the ornate Sturza Palace in Bucharest, with details of its elaborate architecture and a street scene with pedestrians. The postcard is postally used with two Romanian stamps.

title: Greetings from Los Angeles, California
description: A classic 'Large Letter' linen postcard from Los Angeles, California. Each letter of 'LOS ANGELES' contains a different iconic scene from the city and its surroundings.
